task_completion.description: Log in to ArkCase using the provided Administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate the target complaint case titled 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result, case list, or dashboard widget displaying the case titled 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME'.

task_completion.description: Open the target case to view its details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page is open, clearly showing the title 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME' in the header or metadata.

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion process for the target case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A delete confirmation dialog, warning modal, or action menu with 'Delete' selected specifically for the 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME' case.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target case has been permanently deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success toast/message confirming the deletion, or a subsequent search query for 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME' returning no results.

task_completion.description: Ensure the control case 'IMPORTANT-active-case-001' remains in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result, case list, or open case tab showing that 'IMPORTANT-active-case-001' is still present and accessible in the ArkCase UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface rather than using terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase UI, not a terminal window executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the deletion success or case lists.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open modifying the DOM to show fake success messages or alter case titles.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected outcome in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within the actual ArkCase web application, not in Notepad, gedit, or another text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target case to delete: 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME'. Control case to keep: 'IMPORTANT-active-case-001'. Administrator credentials: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!.
